01

Not everything is worth buying.

I built one filter to run every purchase through — a five-second pause before checkout, every single time.

A Money Diary ByPriya Shah
02 / 06
Ledger & Co.
Learn More
02

I check my balance every single morning.

Two quiet minutes with coffee, before the day gets loud. It kills the surprise, and the shame that follows it.

03

I skip anything that isn't already on the list.

If it's not written down, it waits thirty days. Most of it stops mattering by day three.

04

I celebrate every week I hit zero.

Zero spend, not zero joy — I just get inventive with what's already mine.
